name: microCMS
description: Popular Japanese headless CMS with API-first content modeling, preview mode and Jamstack-friendly SDKs.

seo.title: microCMS — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: microCMS: Popular Japanese headless CMS with API-first content modeling, preview mode and Jamstack-friendly SDKs.

when_to_use: Headless CMS API for Japanese JAMstack product
Content modeling for Astro or Next.js blog
Preview mode API for staged content review
Structured content API for multi-channel publishing

pros: Preview mode plays well with Next.js
Generous free tier for small sites
review.verdict: Clean, affordable headless CMS that hits the Jamstack sweet spot if you don't need enterprise governance.
review.best_for: Small Jamstack teams wanting simple CMS with good DX
review.not_for: Large editorial teams requiring complex approval workflows

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
